/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libtethys_library.a CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/BoundaryLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/DirichletBoundaryLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/DyakonovShurBoundaryLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/ElectricLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/Fluid1DLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/Fluid2DLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/GrapheneFluid1DLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/GrapheneFluid2DLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/Grid2DLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/RobinBoundaryLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/SetUpParametersLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/TethysBaseLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tethys_library.dir/src/TethysMathLib.cpp.o
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libtethys_library.a
